𝗙𝗥𝗔𝗠𝗘𝗟𝗬 | A boilerplate for developers to quickly build and deploy multi-tenant websites with a drag-and-drop editor.  🌟 Rising Fast!

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: A boilerplate for developers to quickly build and deploy multi-tenant websites with a drag-and-drop editor.
📅 Created: Feb 2025 • Updated: Mar 2026

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Drag-and-Drop Website Builder
✅ Multi-Tenancy (Subdomains)
✅ User Authentication (Clerk)
✅ Dashboard for site management
✅ Customizable UI components (Shadcn UI)


♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 1.1K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 128 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 0 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Framely is an open-source, full-stack website builder boilerplate built with Next.js. It provides a drag-and-drop interface for creating websites, supports multi-tenancy with subdomains, and includes user authentication via Clerk.

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/belastrittmatter/Framely

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

#boilerplate #clerk #drag_and_drop #editor #full_stack

𝗠𝗔𝗣-𝗧𝗢-𝗣𝗢𝗦𝗧𝗘𝗥 | Generating custom, high-resolution map posters for wall art or personalized gifts.  📈 Growing!

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📜 JavaScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Generating custom, high-resolution map posters for wall art or personalized gifts.
📅 Created: Feb 2026 • Updated: Mar 2026

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Hybrid Rendering System (Leaflet & MapLibre GL)
✅ Precision Geocoding (Nominatim API)
✅ Dynamic Markers
✅ Custom Travel Paths
✅ Mat / Passepartout Framing
✅ Elegant Typography
✅ Draggable UI Overlay
✅ Background Edge Effects
✅ Layout Flexibility
✅ Pro-Grade Exports (up to 50,000px)
✅ Privacy & Performance (100% client-side)


◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 607 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 97 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 1 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

MapToPoster JS is a client-side JavaScript web application that allows users to generate high-resolution, customizable map posters from any location. It offers a hybrid rendering system, dynamic styling options, and pro-grade export capabilities for creating personalized geographic art.

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/dimartarmizi/map-to-poster

◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦◦

🔥 𝗙𝗼𝗹𝗹𝗼𝘄 𝘂𝘀 for daily GitHub projects!

𝗨𝗜-𝗔𝗖𝗧 | To automate repetitive or complex GUI-based tasks on a Linux desktop by interpreting natural language prompts and executing them using simulated mouse and keyboard input.  📈 Growing!

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🦀 Rust 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To automate repetitive or complex GUI-based tasks on a Linux desktop by interpreting natural language prompts and executing them using simulated mouse and keyboard input.
📅 Created: May 2025 • Updated: Mar 2026

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Automates computer tasks via text prompts
✅ Uses its own mouse and keyboard for actions
✅ Works alongside the user without hogging input
✅ Integrates directly into the Linux desktop environment
✅ Supports Anthropic as a backend
✅ Requires X11 session (not Wayland)
✅ Distributes as a Debian package for Ubuntu
✅ Provides CLI tool and GNOME extension for interaction


━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐ 63 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 9 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 5 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

UI Act is a Rust-based computer use agent for Linux that automates tasks by controlling the user's mouse and keyboard. It integrates with the desktop environment, allowing users to continue working while the agent performs actions triggered by text prompts, leveraging Multi-Pointer X for independent control.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/TobiasNorlund/ui-act

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

𝗣𝗜𝗖𝗩𝗜𝗘𝗪 | Viewing and managing a wide variety of image file formats on desktop operating systems with a customizable and efficient user interface.  🔥 Super Hot!

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🔷 C# 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Viewing and managing a wide variety of image file formats on desktop operating systems with a customizable and efficient user interface.
📅 Created: Jan 2017 • Updated: Mar 2026

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Supports numerous image formats (WEBP, GIF, SVG, AVIF, HEIC, PSD, etc.)
✅ Fast and free
✅ Customizable UI with light/dark themes
✅ No ads or tracking
✅ Available for Windows and macOS
✅ Batch processing capabilities (implied by topics)
✅ Image conversion (implied by topics)


▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 3K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 172 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 47 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

PicView is a fast, free, and customizable image viewer for macOS and Windows. It supports a wide array of image formats, including animated WEBP, GIF, SVG, AVIF, HEIC, and PSD, offering a clean user experience without ads or tracking. Users can choose between light and dark themes and customize the interface.

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/Ruben2776/PicView
